package rulecoverage

func NegativeTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "tests_stub_gin_context_instead_of_httptest_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handler tests that mock Gin internals directly instead of using `httptest` when boundary behavior matters."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
